item.title: OC comic repost- help me save my dog
item.description: I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted yesterday about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. Atreyu is still in the animal hospital and his bills have gone up to $8,500 and it’s growing each day Atreyu needs to be hospitalized. Thanks to Imgur, my family and friends we have reached $5,000 so far. We are terrified the vet bills might go over $8,500 so any extra funds will be saved for any complications (Edit/update- the costs went up again he has an infection and they think he needs another surgery to scope for necrosis- new bill is around 10,000) We are desperate to save him. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. I don’t want to lose my best friend. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the life-saving surgery. Atreyu isn’t out of the woods yet, he will be hospitalized for a few more days. His organs had a lot of pressure put on them: especially his liver and spleen, so he is in a critical wait and see state. He might still pass away but we are hoping he survives. The vets are optimistic. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards his emergency surgery would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc NEXT COMIC DUMP: https://imgur.com/gallery/nFMWmPE
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: I'm lovin it.
item.description: *front page edit*   Send me a message about movie recommendations, a selfie, funny videos or gifs or just say hi!
item.dc:creator: thewillofsaga

item.title: Sailors and sea workers, what's the most creepy or amazing sight you witnessed?
item.description:
1.....
2.....
3..... (sound)
4.....
5.....
6.....
7..... (sound) The Sperm Whale can click at 236 decibels- it is the loudest animal on the planet. They could easily “click” a person to death. But when they swim around humans they “lower their voices”, effectively whispering so as to not harm their tiny strange friends: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zsDwFGz0Okg
8.....
9..... “Salar de Uyuni Reflection” by Randy Halverson
10.....
11..... (sound)
12.....
13.....
14..... (sound) (it's music)
15.....
16..... (sound) Here's another encounter: The USS Nimitz UFO incident was a radar-visual encounter of a UFO by US fighter pilots of the Nimitz Carrier in 2004. Pentagon confirmed the footage & witness reports. Here's a fascinating half hour documentary about it: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PRgoisHRmUE
17..... p.s. No need to be afraid of aliens: https://imgur.com/Yxey8N6
18.....
19..... image or recreation of a UFO while submerged underwater
20.....
21..... (sound) (Video from a different dolphin migration)
22.....
23.....
24.....
25.....
26.....
27..... source: https://www.reddit.com/r/AskReddit/comments/129qhku/sailorspeople_working_at_sea_whats_the_most/
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Cost of living really taking its toll
item.dc:creator: thedeadlysheep

item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
is there a different option?
sertraline = zoloft
why
it really is something
practical
Homer demonstrated this in one of my favorite Simpsons episodes "The Cartridge Family"
mmm hmm
i don't think Anakin Skywalker will be joining
i knew they didn't actually exist
i was gonna guess bowling and cigarettes
delicious
well i'm convinced
my bug guy sent me this image and i was a bit flabbergasted
i feel this in my soul
i'm not going to tell you twice
stop doing this everyone
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: OC comic reposts- please help me save my dog
item.description: I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted yesterday about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. Atreyu is still in the animal hospital and his bills have gone up to 10,000 and it’s growing each day Atreyu needs to be hospitalized. Thanks to Imgur, my family and friends we have reached $8,000 so far. A second emergency surgery is being performed, his bill is $12,000 We are desperate to save him. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. I don’t want to lose my best friend. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the life-saving surgery. Atreyu isn’t out of the woods yet, he will be hospitalized for a few more days. His organs had a lot of pressure put on them: especially his liver and spleen, so he is in a critical wait and see state. He might still pass away but we are hoping he survives. The vets are optimistic. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards his emergency surgery would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc

item.title: Someday these two need to figure out if they're fighting or flirting...
item.description:

Dancer/martial artist Fikshun the Samurai. https://www.youtube.com/@fikshunthesamurai (More videos with these two and other available at his youtube)
And multiple time Karate champion turned stuntwoman and actress Kiana Daigneault. https://www.instagram.com/kianadaigneault

item.title: Lost in translation. Found in her heart.
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: A mom's great speech against Moms For Liberty and their knockoffs
item.description:
"Our schools are not your church." In the end that's what it comes down to. There are big forces that want to turn everything into their church, and destroy anything that they can't. But good news! As much noise as they make and as much chaos as they cause, there are only so many of them and they lose as long as we know the enemy and commit to fighting back.
They need friends in local or state government to win, or school boards that are either sympathetic to their cause (because they already have elected officials on it) or too scared to oppose them to win. As long as we stand up and say "No" we win. And yes, they really are a minority. That's why they need to bus in people who aren't even locals at school board meetings:
Or have the same few people trying to mass ban books from schools and libraries.
They can pretend to be the "Silent Majority" all they want, but for all their noise, they're not the majority and they know it. That's why they have to try to go to these lengths to control the rest of us.
Fight the good fight, and kick some ass doing it.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1279
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/MoQc2UR Wholesome Post 1278 https://imgur.com/gallery/u7gkSNN Wholesome Post 1277 https://imgur.com/gallery/PUAlS14 Wholesome Post 1276 https://imgur.com/gallery/N6scbuS Wholesome Post 1275 https://imgur.com/gallery/sc2CZZq Wholesome Post 1274 https://imgur.com/gallery/cmu0zgg Wholesome Post 1273 https://imgur.com/gallery/hGuSUJo Wholesome Post 1272
I include a fundraiser link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/finnegan-needs-a-lifesaving-surgery
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
item.dc:creator: ryanjoseph666

item.title: Robin Williams, 63, 1951-2014.This photo of Robin Williams with his monkey, Crystal, was posted by to his Instagram on his birthday, 20 days before he died.

item.title: Modern Mimics: Delivery
item.description: The package mimic is a fully domesticated mimic that prefers to live on porches, and forms a mutually beneficial relationship with the houses' human residents. Third in a series of Modern Mimics I've been making up with my daughter. More on Webtoon as "Feral Comics". Other comic: "Love and Hex"
item.dc:creator: bondjimbond

item.title: Siri, define 'redemption'.
item.description: https://twitter.com/ResisterSis20/status/1790326269734801686?t=2TPCTjtmagS2rTaWHBJBGw&s=19 Say what you will about this guy, but he's trying to make things right. It can't be easy going up against his former boss, enduring the tweets and the hate-mail, but that's what he's doing, day after day.
item.dc:creator: Yermamma
